message:
feat(lyapunov): Extend StateSnapshot with per-kind obligation breakdown and cancel phases (bd-3rih)

Add 8 new fields to StateSnapshot for richer Lyapunov governor insight:
- Per-kind obligation counts (SendPermit, Ack, Lease, IoOp)
- Cancellation phase counts (CancelRequested, Cancelling, Finalizing)
- Ready queue depth signal (set via with_ready_queue_depth)

Updated from_runtime_state() with single-pass per-kind and cancel-phase
extraction. Added helper methods, updated Display, and 4 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
